summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CodeForge AI platform v2.0 - All major functionality working excellently. Fixed critical chat message bug. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI excellent with Cyber Yellow theme, authentication working, export functionality fully operational.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_issues.impact: Incorrect HTTP status code for resource creation

passed_tests: Landing page loads with perfect Cyber Yellow theme (#E4FF00)
Google OAuth authentication flow working via Emergent
Project creation and management UI working
Chat interface with simulated AI responses working perfectly
Mode Création button opens Emergent in new tab
Mobile export page (/api/export/mobile/{id}) - App Store style design
Desktop export page (/api/export/desktop/{id}) - Download page style
All backend APIs (16/16) working - 100% success rate
AI status indicator showing 'IA en ligne'

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components, authentication, and integrations working perfectly)
